HGSS.713.0004:
Yeah, I knew it.
You’re a rookie after all.\f
HGSS.713.0006:
I gotta say it, shorts are the best!
They remain comfy and easy to wear!
HGSS.713.0008:
I’ll never stop wearing shorts.
Not for anybody!\f
HGSS.713.0009:
I make it a policy to wear
miniskirts!
HGSS.713.0014:
Miniskirts make legs look longer!
Is that a good thing?\f
HGSS.713.0015:
I’m on the lookout for adorable
Accessories.
HGSS.713.0016:
Let me know if you find any nice
Accessories!\f
HGSS.713.0017: I wish I could dress up!\f
HGSS.713.0018:
I want to test out something I
learned at private school.
HGSS.713.0022:
A battle is about momentum and
willpower.\f
HGSS.713.0023:
OK, so willpower doesn’t cut it on
its own.\f
HGSS.713.0024:
I study every day because I want to
work all over the world.
HGSS.713.0026:
I need to study up on Pokémon
battles.\f
HGSS.713.0027:
When I grow up, I’m going to be a
Pokémon professor!
HGSS.713.0028:
Er-hem! Er-hem!
You’ve much to learn, youngster!\f
HGSS.713.0029:
Er-hem! Er-hem!
Seems I’ve much to learn still!\f
HGSS.713.0030:
When the subject is Pokémon, I simply
don’t lose!
HGSS.713.0032:
I’m going to review the subject!
And I’ll subject you to my revenge!\f
HGSS.713.0033:
Oh, now you look wimpy.
I might win this.
HGSS.713.0036:
It’s fine, fine.
No need to say a word.
HGSS.713.0037:
It’s fine, fine.
You tried your best, I know.\f
HGSS.713.0038:
It’s fine, fine...
No need to say a word...\f
HGSS.713.0041:
What happened?
I’m rich, aren’t I?\f
HGSS.713.0043:
Hmm. You’re no big deal.
Hmm?\f
HGSS.713.0044:
Hmm. So, you are good.
Hmm.\f
HGSS.713.0045:
Oh, yes.
I shall attack now.
HGSS.713.0048:
Over it is, your adventure.
Come hither and get whupped!
HGSS.713.0050:
Oh, how vexing this so is.
Verily, I thank you.\f
HGSS.713.0053:
That was a good way to waste some
time.\f
HGSS.713.0056:
I came to camp, but I think I got
separated from my friends...\f
HGSS.713.0057:
Oh!
Don’t you have a Pokétch, too?
HGSS.713.0058:
I was fooling around with my
Pokétch, but I still won!\f
HGSS.713.0059:
I was fooling around with my
Pokétch, and I lost...\f
HGSS.713.0061: It’s the power of the forests.\f
HGSS.713.0062: I’m going back to the forest.\f
HGSS.713.0063: I’ll battle you like I’m on a picnic!
HGSS.713.0065:
Pretending this is a picnic won’t let
me win.\f
HGSS.713.0068:
Ooh-la-la!
Even losing can’t dampen my spirits!\f
HGSS.713.0069:
I’ll teach you what’s fun about
battling.
HGSS.713.0070: Battling me was fun, wasn’t it?\f
HGSS.713.0071:
Oh, my, that was inspiring!
You’re the greatest!\f
HGSS.713.0072:
I... I can swim, really!
I don’t need my inflatable tube!
HGSS.713.0075:
I like rivers more than the sea.
Which do you prefer?
HGSS.713.0076:
Water in rivers is cold, but it feels
just super.\f
HGSS.713.0077:
I don’t like the sea because the
salty water burns my eyes!\f
HGSS.713.0078:
Go, go, go!
Go, my Pokémon!
HGSS.713.0079:
That’s the way!
Way to go, my Pokémon!\f
HGSS.713.0080:
Good effort!
Way to go, my Pokémon!\f
HGSS.713.0081:
The beach sand is so hot! It makes
me go, “Ouch, ouch, ouch!”
HGSS.713.0087:
I’m a girl in love with her inflatable
tube! Nice to meet you!
HGSS.713.0088:
Thank you! I’m a girl in love with
her inflatable tube!\f
HGSS.713.0089:
Good-bye! I’m a girl in love with her
inflatable tube!\f
HGSS.713.0090:
Oh, yeah! I’m feeling it!
I’m tuned in to your wavelength!
HGSS.713.0092:
Tch!
Losing threw off my rhythm!\f
HGSS.713.0093:
Rock? Jazz? Techno?
Anything’ll do for my sound track!
HGSS.713.0095:
So, yeah... You’ve got me in the
mood for singing the blues...\f
HGSS.713.0098:
My dream of a world tour...
It seems so far away...\f
HGSS.713.0099:
Oh, hello...
Well, isn’t that a chic scarf!
HGSS.713.0100: Where did you buy that scarf?\f
HGSS.713.0101:
Oh, you! You’re not just fashionable,
you’re good with Pokémon! How unfair!\f
HGSS.713.0104:
What a horrible way to treat
an Idol...\f
HGSS.713.0108:
Let’s see who loves Pokémon more,
you or me.
HGSS.713.0109:
Fuhaha! Looks like my love for
Pokémon trumped yours!\f
HGSS.713.0110:
Grr... Your love of Pokémon is
stronger than mine?\f
HGSS.713.0111:
I tell ya, my Pokémon are some kind
of tough.
HGSS.713.0112: You don’t want to underestimate me.\f
HGSS.713.0114:
OK, show me your favorite Pokémon.
Don’t be shy now, come on.
HGSS.713.0115:
I see...
Cute, but on the weak side.\f
HGSS.713.0116:
I see!
Cute, and yet tough.\f
HGSS.713.0117:
My Pokémon are cute, but they’re
not very tough!
HGSS.713.0119:
It’s OK. I like my Pokémon.
That’s all that matters.\f
HGSS.713.0120:
I’ve been pampering my gang too
much lately. Can they do it?
HGSS.713.0121:
Ooh, they did it!
I knew I could count on my gang!\f
HGSS.713.0122:
Pampering Pokémon too much is
no good...\f
HGSS.713.0123:
Won’t you join our Pokémon Fan
Club?
HGSS.713.0124:
There’s all sorts of fun things to
do if you join!\f
HGSS.713.0125:
Join us!
Become a Pokéfan like me!\f
HGSS.713.0126: May I take your order, please?
HGSS.713.0127:
Ah, a fine choice.
One loss served fresh.\f
HGSS.713.0128:
Ah, an excellent choice.
A win served fresh.\f
HGSS.713.0129:
What I really hoped to become
was a cook.
HGSS.713.0130: I don’t mind this job now, mind you.\f
HGSS.713.0131:
I just find it hard talking to
strangers.\f
HGSS.713.0132:
For battles and order taking, speed
is essential!
HGSS.713.0134:
Food is like battling.
Serve it while it’s hot!\f
HGSS.713.0135:
My job is about serving others.
But don’t expect me to serve here.
HGSS.713.0137:
Why couldn’t you serve me?
You won’t make friends that way!\f
HGSS.713.0143: I knew you were a tough Trainer.\f
HGSS.713.0144:
I catch and raise all sorts of
Pokémon.
HGSS.713.0145:
See?
I’ve raised them pretty good.\f
HGSS.713.0146:
I need to raise my Pokémon some
more!\f
HGSS.713.0147: I’ll snag you with my net!
HGSS.713.0150: Where can I find a giant HERACROSS?
HGSS.713.0151:
I want a huge HERACROSS.
Like, king size!\f
HGSS.713.0152: If only I had a giant HERACROSS...\f
HGSS.713.0158:
You didn’t fall for my fake ninja
boasting!\f
HGSS.713.0159:
I shall become a real ninja when
I grow up!
HGSS.713.0161:
So, what’s a real ninja supposed to
do?\f
HGSS.713.0165: My mommy made this outfit for me.
HGSS.713.0167: My mommy is really good at sewing.\f
HGSS.713.0171:
Sure, we’re going to battle, but
don’t be over the top about it.
HGSS.713.0172:
Hey, relax, relax.
It’s best to be natural, dig?\f
HGSS.713.0173: You have to loosen up some more.\f
HGSS.713.0174:
Fish, fish, fish, that’s what I do!
I’m gonna fish it all up!
HGSS.713.0175:
Kahahah!
I am at the top of my game!\f
HGSS.713.0176:
Oh, waah!
I let that get away!\f
HGSS.713.0177:
Exploring for relics isn’t all fun
and games!
HGSS.713.0178:
Your skill level says you probably
won’t make a good Ruin Maniac.\f
HGSS.713.0180:
These mates of mine traveled the
world with me!
HGSS.713.0181:
What do you say?
Pretty tough, right?\f
HGSS.713.0182:
Maybe it’s time we hit the
road again...\f
HGSS.713.0183:
Hey, there! Check this out!
My rare Pokémon!
HGSS.713.0184:
Not just rare, either.
My Pokémon are tough, too!\f
HGSS.713.0185:
Aiyah! Hey! Wait!
No! Stop! Don’t touch!\f
HGSS.713.0186:
Now just be patient.
I’ll show you my private collection!
HGSS.713.0187:
See, see? Weren’t they awesome?
They’re the most super of the uber!\f
HGSS.713.0189:
Look! This is my favorite parasol!
Oh, and my fabulous Pokémon!
HGSS.713.0191:
I’m only showing you!
You can’t have any!\f
HGSS.713.0192: Have you ever seen a rainbow?
HGSS.713.0193:
Have you wondered what lies beyond
a rainbow?\f
HGSS.713.0194:
Seeing a rainbow makes me think good
things are in store.\f
HGSS.713.0195:
If you were the weather, what
would you be now?
HGSS.713.0196:
Right now, I’m feeling sunny
without a cloud in the sky!\f
HGSS.713.0198: I really don’t like weak Trainers!
HGSS.713.0200:
A Pokémon Trainer should be tough
and bursting with life!\f
HGSS.713.0201:
Lately, I’ve had a lot to
worry about...
HGSS.713.0202:
Winning makes all my worries
seem trivial!\f
HGSS.713.0203: You just added to my worries...\f
HGSS.713.0204:
This may hurt a little bit, but we’ll
be done quick. Hold still!
HGSS.713.0208:
Sniffle... Snuffle...
I think I have a cold...\f
HGSS.713.0209:
Sniff... Sniffle...
My nose is clogging up...\f
HGSS.713.0211: Now what could this aroma be?\f
HGSS.713.0212:
Do you have some cologne on?
You smell sort of nice!\f
HGSS.713.0213:
You’re going to lose, but you’ll get
to enjoy a nice aroma!
HGSS.713.0214:
Kyahaha! That’s what you get for
swooning to my aroma!\f
HGSS.713.0216:
Let my guitar howl!
Hear me scream!
HGSS.713.0219:
You should channel your feelings into
songs with sincerity, man.
HGSS.713.0220:
The way I feel now?
It’s rock!\f
HGSS.713.0221: The way I feel now is kind of folksy.\f
HGSS.713.0222:
Now hear me!
The Bird Keeper’s credo number one!
HGSS.713.0224: Rest your wings on a loss!\f
HGSS.713.0226: Yup, we both did the best we could!\f
HGSS.713.0228:
Fly, fly, fly!
We’re going to rule this battle!
HGSS.713.0231:
I’m the Sailor among Sailors!
I was born on the high seas!
HGSS.713.0232:
The waves rocked me to sleep!
The sea was my mother!\f
HGSS.713.0233:
Urp... Gweh... So, when I get up on
land, I get no-motion sickness...\f
HGSS.713.0234: I love the sea after all...
HGSS.713.0235:
Oh... I hear them...
I hear the sound of waves...\f
HGSS.713.0236:
I want to become a big man.
Big like the sea big.\f
HGSS.713.0239:
Gweff! Hack! Hack!
Hollering choked me up!\f
HGSS.713.0240:
You should aspire to the Hiker’s
way of life!
HGSS.713.0241:
You see?
You love my lifestyle, don’t you?\f
HGSS.713.0242:
Now, come on now!
You should look up to the way I live!\f
HGSS.713.0243: My Pokémon and I are Idols!
HGSS.713.0244:
Say what you will!
We’re Idols!\f
HGSS.713.0245:
We have you beat when it comes down
to popularity...\f
HGSS.713.0246:
Watch me!
All eyes on me!
HGSS.713.0247:
Ooh...
This is what I live for...\f
HGSS.713.0248:
I became an Idol because I wanted
everyone to see me!\f
HGSS.713.0249:
I’m too into battling...
They might fire me as an Idol...
HGSS.713.0251:
I can’t help myself.
No one can keep me from battling.\f
HGSS.713.0252:
I run a marathon every morning!
It’s great!
HGSS.713.0253:
My buff physique makes for
easy wins!\f
HGSS.713.0254:
So I lost!
I can still run great marathons!\f
HGSS.713.0255:
I’ll run on the spot while battling
for the good of my health.
HGSS.713.0256: Let’s hear it for good health!\f
HGSS.713.0257:
Gasp!
My ankle! I rolled my ankle!\f
HGSS.713.0258:
Out of the way!
I’ve got deliveries to make!
HGSS.713.0259:
What? You want me to deliver you
somewhere, too?\f
HGSS.713.0260:
All the delivering I do every day...
I’ve got deep muscle pain!\f
HGSS.713.0261:
It was me who put up the buildings
around these parts.
HGSS.713.0262:
So, what do you think?
Cool stuff, huh?\f
HGSS.713.0263:
My dream is to make a building taller
than a mountain!\f
HGSS.713.0264:
Smell that? That’s the smell of hay
clinging to my body.
HGSS.713.0266:
This smell I have is the sweet scent
of hay that Pokémon surely love.\f
HGSS.713.0267:
All right, take a run at me!
My barrel chest can take it!
HGSS.713.0268:
What? That’s all you’ve got?
You can take a harder run at me!\f
HGSS.713.0269:
Ooh... Ow... That hurt... It’s like
you broke my barrel chest...\f
HGSS.713.0270:
I’m not getting any younger.
I can’t overexert myself.
HGSS.713.0271:
What I lack in youth, I make up for
in experience.\f
HGSS.713.0272:
Oh, you’re good and young.
There’s a sparkle about you.\f
HGSS.713.0273:
Hey! You there, Trainer!
You and me, we’re battling!
HGSS.713.0276:
These here are my Pokémon.
I raised them with my ma and pa.
HGSS.713.0277:
Sure right kind of tough, aren’t
they?\f
HGSS.713.0278:
Well, I’ll be!
We lost that one!\f
HGSS.713.0279:
I’m going to do my level best.
You’d better keep up!
HGSS.713.0280: Whew! We sure did our best!\f
HGSS.713.0284:
That’s a great smile! Your victory
pose is picture perfect, too!\f
HGSS.713.0288: This camera is pretty hefty, actually.
HGSS.713.0289:
My shoulder is always rock stiff...
My camera’s toughened me up.\f
HGSS.713.0291:
Hello there, Trainer!
Please battle with me!
HGSS.713.0294:
I’ll do anything for a good
news story!
HGSS.713.0296:
Stop! Please, stop!
You’ll break my mic!\f
HGSS.713.0297:
So, the question is, what is your
opinion of me?
HGSS.713.0298:
“What a tough Trainer!” Is that
what you’re thinking?\f
HGSS.713.0299:
I’m doing a live report on the topic
of myself!\f
HGSS.713.0303:
Gear change!
We’re attacking at top speed!
HGSS.713.0306:
Can you keep up with my Pokémon at
a full run?
HGSS.713.0308:
I’m taking it to a zone beyond
speed!\f
HGSS.713.0309:
I’d rather cycle casually than go
full speed.
HGSS.713.0311:
You ought to take things more
casually...\f
HGSS.713.0312:
I only know how to go at full power,
even against a younger opponent!
HGSS.713.0313: Full power is how I win!\f
HGSS.713.0314:
Please! Let me call you Master
Trainer from now on!\f
HGSS.713.0315:
My spirit burns, my fists are steel,
and my sweat cascades!
HGSS.713.0317:
I sweated more. That makes
me the victor!\f
HGSS.713.0324:
The ultimate of my techniques!
Experience it in its entirety!
HGSS.713.0327:
Hi! Little kid!
A battle, please!
HGSS.713.0328:
Little kid!
Thank you very kindly!\f
HGSS.713.0329:
Little kid!
I’m really upset over this!\f
HGSS.713.0330:
I, um... I’ve never actually learned
how to do karate.
HGSS.713.0332:
A Black Belt is cool, huh?
So I just dress up like one.\f
HGSS.713.0333:
It’s been five years since I took to
the mountains. My hair’s grown wild!
HGSS.713.0334:
I bathe every day!
How dare you?\f
HGSS.713.0336:
Did I catch you smirking at my
eight-pack abs?
HGSS.713.0337:
You don’t appreciate the beauty of
pure muscles!\f
HGSS.713.0339:
In love and in battles, I’ve never
tasted defeat!
HGSS.713.0341:
So, I lost. I don’t care!
I have a date soon, so I don’t care!\f
HGSS.713.0342:
This is it! Over the top!
Everyone charge!
HGSS.713.0343:
The enemy Trainer has fallen!
Victory is ours!\f
HGSS.713.0345:
My career as a Trainer dates back
75 years. You think you can win?
HGSS.713.0346: Here’s a toast to my history!\f
HGSS.713.0349: Ah, a superb battle that was.\f
HGSS.713.0350: I tip my hat to you.\f
HGSS.713.0351:
Oh, my...
Such an adorable Trainer...
HGSS.713.0353:
I see...
You’re more than simply adorable.\f
HGSS.713.0355:
A stirring shout, wouldn’t you say?
I find it quite bracing.
HGSS.713.0356:
Gasp... Gasp...
Oh, dear... I’m worn out.\f
HGSS.713.0357:
Being rich doesn’t shield me from
having worries...
HGSS.713.0358:
Of course, being well off is much
preferable to poverty, but...\f
HGSS.713.0359:
Lavish parties day after day...
It gets rather tiresome, I must say.\f
HGSS.713.0360:
Come to know defeat...
Learn what it means to battle...
HGSS.713.0361:
I see you becoming ever more
powerful...\f
HGSS.713.0365:
My power of suggestion failed to
charm you!\f
HGSS.713.0368: I focused my mind in silence...\f
HGSS.713.0369:
My powers!
There’s no trickery about them!
HGSS.713.0375:
Close your eyes and count...
Slow... Slower...
HGSS.713.0376:
That was the countdown to my
victory!\f
HGSS.713.0377:
Tch...
I thought I could lull you to sleep.\f
HGSS.713.0379:
I’ve never been much of a battler,
but...\f
HGSS.713.0380: I’m just not much of a battler.\f
HGSS.713.0381:
...They’re Pokémon I’ve raised with
my father...
HGSS.713.0382:
...Dad, are you seeing this?
I did it...\f
HGSS.713.0383:
Dad, I can’t...
I need to raise them some more...\f
HGSS.713.0384:
Raising Pokémon takes a lot of
honest effort!
HGSS.713.0385:
Yahaha! I’ve had a hands-on time
raising those Pokémon!\f
HGSS.713.0386:
Urgwah!
Look what you’ve done to my Pokémon!\f
HGSS.713.0387:
Will you have a look at the Pokémon
I’ve raised?
HGSS.713.0390: I specialize in raising cute Pokémon!
HGSS.713.0393:
Nice to meet you!
Underestimate me at your peril!
HGSS.713.0396:
Hmhm... I must say I like the look
in your eyes.
HGSS.713.0397:
Your eyes remain unclouded in defeat.
Like jewels they are!\f
HGSS.713.0398:
Your eyes shine brighter than any
big gemstone I keep at home!\f
HGSS.713.0399:
When I was your age, I was quite
the daredevil, I must say.
HGSS.713.0400:
Seeing you reminds me of my own
wild youth.\f
HGSS.713.0401:
I daresay, you’re quite the
daredevil yourself!\f
HGSS.713.0402:
If you want to run home to mommy,
here’s your chance, punk!
HGSS.713.0405:
Battles achieve nothing!
Take my hand! It’s about love!
HGSS.713.0406:
I didn’t mean to battle--but take my
hand! It’s about love!\f
HGSS.713.0407:
Battling is futile!
Take my hand! It’s about love!\f
HGSS.713.0408:
I dropped my glasses.
I can’t see straight.
HGSS.713.0409:
I guess I won.
I can’t see enough to tell.\f
HGSS.713.0410:
I guess I lost.
I can’t see enough to tell.\f
HGSS.713.0411:
Steadily and surely.
You build from the little things up.
HGSS.713.0412: Steadily and surely is how I won!\f
HGSS.713.0413:
But I did things steadily and
surely...\f
HGSS.713.0417:
Everybody gather around for my
stupendicular Pokémon show!
HGSS.713.0421:
Show some spine!
On your feet!\f
HGSS.713.0423:
Why get all intellectual about things?
If it’s fun, why question it?
HGSS.713.0424:
See, I can still win.
I don’t see a problem!\f
HGSS.713.0425:
So I lost!
If it’s fun, it’s cool!\f
HGSS.713.0426:
I expect you to be good...
Don’t you disappoint me!
HGSS.713.0429:
My papa and mama are high-skill
Trainers, too.
HGSS.713.0432:
I go all out in battle, no matter
what.
HGSS.713.0435:
This is it! The biggest battle in my
life! I cannot afford to lose!
HGSS.713.0437: This sets me back to being a Lass...\f
HGSS.713.0438:
My love of nature and Pokémon made
a Ranger out of me!
HGSS.713.0440:
Ooh...
I still love to battle, too.\f
HGSS.713.0441:
Hi! Have you ever considered a
career as a Ranger?
HGSS.713.0442:
Well, you might not make it at your
skill level.\f
HGSS.713.0443:
Yes, you’ve got the mettle.
Being a Ranger is a lot of fun!\f
HGSS.713.0444:
Win or lose, a battle happens only
once!
HGSS.713.0447:
It’s my sworn duty to protect nature
and the Pokémon in it.
HGSS.713.0448:
It’s a challenging life, but there’s
a lot to enjoy every day.\f
HGSS.713.0449:
It’s a rewarding career.
How does it sound to you?\f
HGSS.713.0450:
My darling Pokémon will lay a licking
on you!
HGSS.713.0452:
Well, aren’t you tough?
I’m a little stunned!\f
HGSS.713.0453:
I didn’t sleep while trying to come
up with this new strategy!
HGSS.713.0455:
Oh, but...
I really needed to sleep tonight...\f
HGSS.713.0456:
The credo of the Dragon Tamer!
Number one!
HGSS.713.0457:
In victory, roar!
Roar with your dragon!\f
HGSS.713.0458:
Even in defeat, roar!
Roar with your dragon!\f
HGSS.713.0462:
See it! Feel it!
The ultimate power... Probably!
HGSS.713.0463:
There is no defeat for me, the
ultimate... Probably!\f
HGSS.713.0464:
The title of the ultimate probably!
I confer it on you!\f
HGSS.713.0466:
Hihihi... That’s what you get for
letting down your guard.\f
HGSS.713.0468:
I can’t stand getting cold, but I’m
quite good.
HGSS.713.0469:
Ch-chatter...
Wa-wahaha. I won, I won!\f
HGSS.713.0471: My ace Pokémon are on the go!
HGSS.713.0472:
You surprise me!
Not too shabby!\f
HGSS.713.0473: I like the sense you show!\f
HGSS.713.0474:
Snow is wonderful!
Everything becomes white.
HGSS.713.0477:
Don’t you think this coat is cute?
It limits my movements, though.
HGSS.713.0480:
I’m the one! Number one out of all
the kids in shorts!
HGSS.713.0481:
See? That’s what being number one
is about!\f
HGSS.713.0483:
I’m the one! The only one true one
among shorts-wearing kids!
HGSS.713.0484:
See? That’s what being the only one
is about!\f
HGSS.713.0486:
Um...
I’m pleased to meet you.
HGSS.713.0496: You offered me nothing new to learn.\f
HGSS.713.0497:
I get it now. In that situation,
I should have used that move.\f
HGSS.713.0498:
My teacher gave me advice on
battling.
HGSS.713.0499:
My teacher was right!
That was just so easy!\f
HGSS.713.0500:
Aww, my teacher was wrong!
None of it worked!\f
HGSS.713.0501:
Why are we battling?
I don’t get it.
HGSS.713.0503:
Why did you win?
What happens now?\f
HGSS.713.0504:
Ultimately, Pokémon is just another
brand. You know who’ll win, right?
HGSS.713.0505:
I’m not interested in what was an
inevitable result.\f
HGSS.713.0506:
But how... My...
The Pokémon I’ve raised...\f
HGSS.713.0507:
There isn’t anything that I can’t
buy. Money can buy battles!
HGSS.713.0508:
There’s nothing that money can’t
buy.\f
HGSS.713.0509:
I’ll give you my allowance if you’ll
let me win.\f
HGSS.713.0510:
You know, I’m really not cut out for
doing this socialite-lady thing...
HGSS.713.0513: I’ll be done with you lickety-split!
HGSS.713.0514: Lickety-split is how you were done!\f
HGSS.713.0515:
Lickety-split is how I’ll
excuse myself!\f
HGSS.713.0517: I love these crunchy Lava Cookies...\f
HGSS.713.0518:
What am I standing on?
Busted Poké Balls?\f
HGSS.713.0519:
The way of the Bug Catcher!
Bear witness to it!
HGSS.713.0520: This is the way of the Bug Catcher!\f
HGSS.713.0522:
Feast your eyes on secret techniques
of the ancients!
HGSS.713.0523:
See? What did you think?
Are you awestruck?\f
HGSS.713.0524:
That’s my cue to disappear in a puff
of smoke.\f
HGSS.713.0531:
A battle, you say?
I’m never losing to you!
HGSS.713.0532:
Yeehah! Yippee!
I won, I won!\f
HGSS.713.0534: It’s my job to be cute!
HGSS.713.0535: Just being cute is money in the bank!\f
HGSS.713.0537:
You can shake hands with me!
It would be quite the honor for you!
HGSS.713.0538:
If you’d won, I would have even
given you my autograph!\f
HGSS.713.0539:
My management team will have
something to say about this!\f
HGSS.713.0545:
All right.
Thanks for coming by.\f
HGSS.713.0546:
My cohorts call me the emperor
of fishing!
HGSS.713.0547: I landed another big one today!\f
HGSS.713.0548:
Why the emperor of fishing?
It’s an ancient Chinese legend...\f
HGSS.713.0549:
When you get as good as me, you can
win easily, even if asleep.
HGSS.713.0552:
My mom and I travel around in search
of lost treasures.
HGSS.713.0553:
The rest of the time, we fish and
tend to crops every single day.\f
HGSS.713.0554: You sure seem to be hectic.\f
HGSS.713.0555:
Win! That’s what I’ll do again today!
I’ll win tomorrow, too!
HGSS.713.0556:
Nahaha! Nahaha!
I’m not gonna lose my whole life!\f
HGSS.713.0557:
Nooooo! No way!
I didn’t lose!\f
HGSS.713.0558:
Allow me to examine your prowess as
a collector.
HGSS.713.0559:
You’re still wanting.
I urge you to keep at it.\f
HGSS.713.0560:
That’s quite the collection.
I’m willing to relieve you of the lot.\f
HGSS.713.0564:
I want you to hear it!
A shout from the heart!
HGSS.713.0566: Let’s hear it for an encore!\f
HGSS.713.0572: I’m gonna pluck you for that!\f
HGSS.713.0576:
Looking out over the sea’s breaking
waves... It revives memories.
HGSS.713.0579:
Come on! Take a run at me!
I can take it!
HGSS.713.0580:
So, what’d you think?
I was too burly for you to handle?\f
HGSS.713.0581:
Good job!
Way to overcome my size!\f
HGSS.713.0582:
Waah! Wait! Wait a second!
My mind’s not into this yet!
HGSS.713.0583:
Hunh? It’s over already?
What? I won, you say?\f
HGSS.713.0584:
Huh? Hah? It’s over already?
What? I lost, you say?\f
HGSS.713.0585:
My favorite drink is Moomoo Milk.
Got some?
HGSS.713.0586:
Wahaha! I get the win!
Let’s celebrate over some Moomoo Milk!\f
HGSS.713.0587:
Gwaah! Moomoo Milk!
Bring me some Moomoo Milk!\f
HGSS.713.0588:
You’re under arrest!
You’re under arrest!
HGSS.713.0591:
I’m not a real Policeman.
I’m a uniform collector.
HGSS.713.0592:
You look like a uniform will suit you.
You should try to find one you like.\f
HGSS.713.0593:
I must say, battling is a
wonderful thing.\f
HGSS.713.0595:
You can lose one day, and win the
next. That’s how it goes.\f
HGSS.713.0596:
I might win tomorrow.
That’s what I believe.\f
HGSS.713.0597: I’m throwing my all into this match!
HGSS.713.0600:
The indefatigable Camper makes
his stand!
HGSS.713.0601:
You can become a devotee if
you’d like.\f
HGSS.713.0602: I wish I could become your devotee.\f
HGSS.713.0603:
I don’t think I have any chance of
winning, but sure, I’ll battle.
HGSS.713.0604: Wow, I wasn’t expecting to win.\f
HGSS.713.0605:
I knew I’d lose.
I’m so sorry for this.\f
HGSS.713.0606:
I think you’re awfully interested in
me, aren’t you?
HGSS.713.0607:
You lost because you were paying too
much attention to me.\f
HGSS.713.0608:
Why did you win?
I thought you liked me.\f
HGSS.713.0609:
Win or lose, let’s not bear any
grudges.
HGSS.713.0610:
Yay, yay, yay!
We did it!\f
HGSS.713.0611:
Oh, you!
Don’t ever forget this!\f
HGSS.713.0612:
Pokémon are for adults, too...
Let me show you...
HGSS.713.0613:
What do you think?
Am I deep like an old blues man?\f
HGSS.713.0614:
Though it cuts me deep, it’s a man’s
lot in life to endure the pain...\f
HGSS.713.0615:
What I have here isn’t really a
guitar.
HGSS.713.0617: This here is a keyboard synth.\f
HGSS.713.0618:
For work, I sometimes get to be a
Swimmer or a Beauty.
HGSS.713.0620:
But the real me...
I’m still a Lass in a miniskirt!\f
HGSS.713.0621:
Let’s enjoy ourselves.
I hate anything to do with pain!
HGSS.713.0623:
Yowch! Watch it!
You play too rough!\f
HGSS.713.0624:
I’ll put an end to this!
With my favorite Pokémon!
HGSS.713.0625:
The love I have for my Pokémon is
complete and perfectly strong...\f
HGSS.713.0626:
Why? Why?!
Why did I lose?!\f
HGSS.713.0627:
Living with Pokémon...
Every day is the greatest.
HGSS.713.0629:
It’s not a problem if I lose.
I still have my Pokémon...\f
HGSS.713.0630:
I have my Pokémon.
I don’t need anything else.
HGSS.713.0631:
With my Pokémon, I can be happy
every day.\f
HGSS.713.0632:
Isn’t that the same for you?
Isn’t it?\f
HGSS.713.0633:
You won’t guess it now, but I was
quite the party girl in my day.
HGSS.713.0634: Well, I still have it now, you know.\f
HGSS.713.0635: I feel nostalgic for those days...\f
HGSS.713.0636:
Do your best!
My beloved children!
HGSS.713.0637:
Wahaha! Well done!
Mama’s proud of you!\f
HGSS.713.0638: My Pokémon are my beloved family.\f
HGSS.713.0639:
Little boy? Little girl? Doesn’t
matter which. Let’s do this!
HGSS.713.0640:
Little boy? Little girl?
Doesn’t matter which, but sorry.\f
HGSS.713.0641:
Little boy? Little girl? Doesn’t
matter which, but you’re sure tough!\f
HGSS.713.0644: Too much for me to handle!\f
HGSS.713.0645:
We’re going for the win!
Hey-ho, let’s go!
HGSS.713.0648:
Let me introduce to you
my cherished partners!
HGSS.713.0649:
How did you find them?
My cherished partners.\f
HGSS.713.0651:
Winning and losing isn’t all there is
to battling.
HGSS.713.0652:
Well, sure, it makes me happy when
I win.\f
HGSS.713.0653:
The effort you put in is what’s
important.\f
HGSS.713.0654:
It’s no good to be too harsh...
But pampering is also out...
HGSS.713.0655:
Being a Pokémon Breeder is a deep
and complex challenge.\f
HGSS.713.0656:
Balance is key for raising good
Pokémon.\f
HGSS.713.0657:
I’ll check how your Pokémon have
grown for you.
HGSS.713.0658:
Not good enough!
Your training style’s not up to par.\f
HGSS.713.0659:
This is impressive! You’ve raised your
Pokémon really thoroughly.\f
HGSS.713.0663:
Fwaah! Fwaah!
You think you can beat me?
HGSS.713.0666:
I’ve caught you now.
Give up.
HGSS.713.0667:
You weren’t bad.
Let’s meet again.\f
HGSS.713.0669:
Yo, yo!
Let’s have a fun time!
HGSS.713.0672:
You’re no good at all.
I’d better teach you.
HGSS.713.0673:
No, no, this won’t do at all.
Up on your feet. Never give up!\f
HGSS.713.0674:
You’ve got good skills.
You tried hard, too. Excellent!\f
HGSS.713.0675:
I’m jacking up the power to max!
All the way to eleven!
HGSS.713.0680:
Hoh! You are tough!
Give me a rematch!\f
HGSS.713.0681: You need to be serious with me!
HGSS.713.0684:
Ahaha! Too bad for you!
I’m your opponent!
HGSS.713.0687:
Are you nervous?
Leave it to the dude!
HGSS.713.0688:
That was a good battle.
I hope we can meet again.\f
HGSS.713.0689:
Whew...
The dude wasn’t expecting to lose.\f
HGSS.713.0690:
The power of nature!
Let me show you!
HGSS.713.0691: This is the power of nature!\f
HGSS.713.0693:
A battle with me? I don’t know what
you’re talking about.
HGSS.713.0694:
See?
I thought this would happen.\f
HGSS.713.0695:
Boo! Boo!
This is not right!\f
HGSS.713.0696:
Fuhahaha!
Your next challenge is me!
HGSS.713.0697:
Fuhahaha! You seriously believed you
could defeat me?\f
HGSS.713.0699:
Off you go! Face my team of totally
trained Pokémon!
HGSS.713.0700:
Bravo!
I knew my Pokémon would do it!\f
HGSS.713.0701:
Oh, no! That’s awful!
What have you done to my Pokémon?!\f
HGSS.713.0702:
A battle is deadly earnest!
Not a moment of inattention!
HGSS.713.0704:
I seemed to have let my
mind wander...\f
HGSS.713.0714:
I’ve been here for years, but I never
get tired of this.
HGSS.713.0715:
You might not think so, but I’m still
a kid. I’m in the same grade as you.\f
HGSS.713.0716:
I’d like to keep battling Pokémon
even when my hair is gray.\f
HGSS.713.0717:
Let me make one thing clear...
You aren’t capable of beating me.
HGSS.713.0718:
Did I not say? There is no possible
chance of you beating me.\f
HGSS.713.0719:
How could this be...? Only that girl with
the inflatable tube has beaten me...\f
HGSS.713.0722:
Children these days...
Quite exuberant, methinks.\f
HGSS.713.0723:
I would like my children to become
strong and distinguished Trainers.
HGSS.713.0724:
It wouldn’t do if my children were
only as good as you...\f
HGSS.713.0725:
It would be nice if they were as
skilled as you...\f
HGSS.713.0729: My family will show you a good time!
HGSS.713.0730:
Hold up, my family!
That’ll be enough already!\f
HGSS.713.0735:
My big brother told me!
Eyes! Aim for the eyes!
HGSS.713.0736:
Yay! I did it!
My big brother’s plan worked!
HGSS.713.0737:
My big brother told me to lower
the foe’s accuracy!
HGSS.713.0738:
Hoy! You look pretty tough.
This is gonna be fun!
HGSS.713.0739:
I thought so!
You are tough!\f
HGSS.713.0740:
Yup, you sure are tough.
Keep it up!\f
HGSS.713.0741:
Ah, welcome!
I’m your server today!
HGSS.713.0742: Would you care to settle your bill?\f
HGSS.713.0747:
I love cute customers like you!
I’ll serve you right!
HGSS.713.0748:
Well, were you happy with the way
I served you?\f
HGSS.713.0749:
Oh, but...
I’m not done serving you.\f
HGSS.713.0751: You’ve got something on your nose.\f
HGSS.713.0752:
You’re cool, all right.
I had to stare.\f
HGSS.713.0753:
I’ve waited a long time for a Trainer
like you to come along.
HGSS.713.0754:
Yup, you’re as tough as I thought.
You even had me in trouble!\f
HGSS.713.0755:
I knew it!
You are a tough Trainer!\f
HGSS.713.0756:
Now how should I conduct
this offensive?
HGSS.713.0757:
Oh, now, I need a better effort out
of you than that.\f
HGSS.713.0758:
Oh, you’re finished and content?
OK, another time, then.\f
HGSS.713.0759:
My Pokémon have a different taste
from the usual bunch.
HGSS.713.0760:
Did you notice the difference?
My party has rich depth.\f
HGSS.713.0761:
Did you notice the difference?
My party is refreshingly dry.\f
HGSS.713.0763:
This feeling of elation is bubbling
up in me!\f
HGSS.713.0764:
Ooch...
You’re too much to handle.\f
HGSS.713.0765:
Varrroooom!
Watch me go full throttle!
HGSS.713.0766:
Vavavaroooom!
I’m not close to redlining!\f
HGSS.713.0767:
Vrrr... Vrruuu...
I’m flat out of gas...\f
HGSS.713.0771:
It’s my dream to cycle with my
boyfriend.
HGSS.713.0773: I wish I had a boyfriend!\f
HGSS.713.0774:
What’s your motive?
What brought you here?
HGSS.713.0775:
You lose.
Now what will you do?\f
HGSS.713.0780:
You’re serious? A battle?
And that’s against me?
HGSS.713.0783:
I’ll dance and sing and rivet
your attention!
HGSS.713.0785:
So much for riveting your attention.
You nailed my Pokémon!\f
HGSS.713.0789: Can you explain why I’m here?
HGSS.713.0792:
My fishing-rod-handling technique is
the best in all Sinnoh. Check it out!
HGSS.713.0794:
How I handle my fishing rod has
nothing to do with battling...\f
HGSS.713.0795:
The two loves of my life are fishing
and battling.
HGSS.713.0796:
I feel fantastic when I land a big
fish or win a big battle.\f
HGSS.713.0797: I was born to fish and battle!\f
HGSS.713.0798:
I come here on a ship.
Big ship it was.
HGSS.713.0799:
Sinnoh, I like.
Very nice place.\f
HGSS.713.0800:
You want go to sea? My ship, we will
see wonderful things.\f
HGSS.713.0801:
Huh? You’re my opponent?
This is kind of unnerving...
HGSS.713.0802:
I’m surprised...
I didn’t think I’d win.\f
HGSS.713.0803:
See, I told you...
I thought you were tough.\f
HGSS.713.0807:
Let’s be good sports about this!
Big smile!
HGSS.713.0808:
Ahaha! Ahaha!
Come on, you laugh, too!\f
HGSS.713.0809:
I’m cheerful even in defeat!
Ahaha! Ahaha!\f
HGSS.713.0813:
The sweetest thing about battling?
The finishing blow!
HGSS.713.0814:
Take that!
That’s my finishing move!\f
HGSS.713.0815:
Oof...
I feel your final shots...\f
HGSS.713.0819:
Listen! This is my chorus group.
Me and my Pokémon!
HGSS.713.0821:
Oh, wait!
We’re not done singing!\f
HGSS.713.0822:
I got tips from my online friends on
how to best raise my troop.
HGSS.713.0823:
I must thank my online friends.
I don’t know who they are, though.\f
HGSS.713.0824:
Well, this blows!
My online buddies let me down!\f
HGSS.713.0825:
Can I have a moment?
I’m trying to write some email.
HGSS.713.0826:
I need to get home quick and check
on my email.\f
HGSS.713.0827:
What do you think you’re doing?
I want to go already.\f
HGSS.713.0828:
Father... Mother...
Please watch over me...
HGSS.713.0831:
Can’t rightly say I much like
battling, I tell you.
HGSS.713.0832:
I won, but...
I’m still shaking...\f
HGSS.713.0833:
Grr...
I’m so angry I could cry...\f
HGSS.713.0835:
Did you see? Were you amazed?
That’s the power of science!\f
HGSS.713.0836:
It’s inconceivable... How could the
power of science be defeated?\f
HGSS.713.0837:
Charge, my Pokémon! Demonstrate the
fruits of our experimentation!
HGSS.713.0838:
Yes, my Pokémon proved my theory!
I’ll get my professorship now!\f
HGSS.713.0839:
What kind of experiments?
That’s classified.
HGSS.713.0840:
I shall regress to my childhood for
this battle.
HGSS.713.0843:
Fwahahaha!
You’ve come a long way!
HGSS.713.0845:
Fwahahaha!
You’re blessed to have your friends!\f
HGSS.713.0849:
Why, sure! Sounds great!
We have to do this!
HGSS.713.0851:
A battle while working...
It’s a good way to take a break.\f
HGSS.713.0852:
I’ll try to do my best!
Please give me this chance!
HGSS.713.0853:
I’ve done it!
I’ve achieved my goal!\f
HGSS.713.0854:
I tried the best I could!
Thank you for your encouragement!\f
HGSS.713.0855:
A battle is... It is a love letter
written in sand.
HGSS.713.0856:
Did you understand what I’m trying
to say? I guess you wouldn’t.\f
HGSS.713.0857:
Did you understand what I’m trying
to say? I guess you wouldn’t.\f
HGSS.713.0858:
Hello, you there! Yes, you!
Hold up. Hold it, I say!
HGSS.713.0859:
OK, kids shouldn’t be out now.
Go home, and be quick about it.\f
HGSS.713.0860:
You shouldn’t mess with a police
officer like that.\f
HGSS.713.0862:
CLEFAIRY... Mumble...
Wait for me... Sssnork...\f
HGSS.713.0867:
A battle isn’t something you
can calculate.
HGSS.713.0868:
What’d I tell you?
You win when you win.\f
HGSS.713.0869:
What’d I say, huh?
You lose when you lose.\f
HGSS.713.0870:
There’s lots in life that doesn’t
go the way you want.
HGSS.713.0873: There’s nowhere to run or hide!
HGSS.713.0876:
I wait for tough Trainers here,
come rain or come shine.
HGSS.713.0877:
Because of that, I’ve grown so
very strong...\f
HGSS.713.0878:
Won’t a tough... No, forget that.
I need a cool Trainer to come...\f
HGSS.713.0879: This is for keeping the sun off.
HGSS.713.0880:
I’m strong at battling, but I can’t
take sunlight...\f
HGSS.713.0881: I don’t want to roast my skin.\f
HGSS.713.0883:
I’ve never caught those...
Your Pokémon are different, all right.\f
HGSS.713.0884:
Oh, you’re a Trainer?
You’re not a Pokémon?\f
HGSS.713.0888:
Beat me?
Try again in another ten years!
HGSS.713.0891:
Smelling sweet scents makes me
so drowsy...
HGSS.713.0892:
...Yawn...
Oh? Are we finished so soon?\f
HGSS.713.0894:
You’re sure you can handle me?
I’m an ultrastellar talent.
HGSS.713.0895:
Don’t feel bad!
I’m an ultrastellar talent!\f
HGSS.713.0897:
I live only for battles.
Only victories give me hope.
HGSS.713.0916:
A magnificent bout that was!
Do come visit again!\f
HGSS.713.0917:
Losing to an outstanding Trainer like
you... I can live with that.\f
HGSS.713.0919:
A magnificent bout that was!
Do come visit again!\f
HGSS.713.0920:
Losing to an outstanding Trainer like
you... I can live with that.\f
